item.title: opendataloader-project/opendataloader-pdf
item.description: PDF Parser for AI-ready data. Automate PDF accessibility. Open-source.

item.title: bytedance/Dolphin
item.description: The official repo for “Dolphin: Document Image Parsing via Heterogeneous Anchor Prompting”, ACL, 2025.
